findings.title: Detached CLI fan-out prompt omits required review init bindings
findings.recommendation: Add the same setup bindings used by buildNativeCommandInput to buildLoopPrompt for review lineages (review_target, review_target_type, review_dimensions, lineage_mode, execution_mode/stop fields); add a regression assertion that a CLI review lineage prompt satisfies step_preflight_contract.
findings.disposition_evidence: fanout-run.cjs setupBindings block (loopType review/context) pre-binds review_target/review_target_type/review_dimensions/spec_folder/execution_mode/lineage_mode before any writes.

findings.title: Unrecoverable iteration salvage can still produce a fulfilled lineage when the summary report exists
findings.recommendation: Reject or retry a lineage when salvage.failed > 0 unless every state-log iteration has a non-marker iteration markdown file; attach salvage summary to the thrown error so salvage_miss classification runs.
findings.disposition_evidence: fanout-run.cjs throws on non-zero exit or timeout (comment: prevents pool from recording a failed lineage as fulfilled), verified at the exit/timeout check.

findings.title: Mixed salvage/missing-artifact failures skip the transient retry path
findings.recommendation: Classify any salvage.failed > 0 lineage-artifact failure as retryable unless an explicit fatal exit class is present, or attach a separate missingArtifacts/artifact_miss retry signal; add a regression where one iteration is salvaged but the top-level expected artifact remains missing and the retry succeeds.
findings.disposition_evidence: cli-guards.cjs classifyLineageFailure has an ARTIFACT_MISS retryable class for salvaged>0 && failed>0 (mixed salvage), explicitly preventing fallthrough to fatal EXIT.

findings.title: Detached OpenCode lineages run with prompt-only write isolation
findings.recommendation: Stop using --dangerously-skip-permissions for detached cli-opencode review lineages unless an equivalent path-scoped sandbox is active; pass the strongest available sandbox/workdir flags, allow sandboxMode where supported, and make unsafe fallback opt-in with a fatal warning for review fan-out.
findings.disposition_evidence: fanout-run.cjs gates --dangerously-skip-permissions behind an explicit danger-full-access opt-in (useDangerousBypass); workspace-write/read-only lineages run under normal CLI permission enforcement by default.

findings.title: Fan-out adversarial playbook claims exit-0/no-artifact coverage, but the referenced regression never exercises that path
findings.recommendation: Add or repoint the regression to an exit-0/no-artifact case using the existing no-artifact stub, assert it is classified/retried/failed as documented, and update the playbook only after the exact bug-under-guard path is covered.
findings.disposition_evidence: tests/unit/fanout-run.vitest.ts contains "treats an exit-0/no-artifact lineage as salvage-miss and fails it after retry (not fulfilled)"; independently re-run, passes.

findings.title: 009 remediation parent is marked complete while its parent docs still contain scaffolds and pending child states
findings.recommendation: Regenerate/finalize the 009 parent spec, tasks, and implementation summary from the completed child docs, replace every scaffold placeholder and pending phase-map row, and rerun metadata backfill so parent status matches child evidence.
findings.disposition_evidence: 008-loop-systems-remediation/spec.md Phase Documentation Map shows all 7 children Complete with no placeholder scaffolds; 009-research-backlog-remediation/spec.md Status correctly reads In Progress (not falsely Complete) while children 006-011 remain pending.

findings.title: Parent and remediation discovery metadata omit the fan-out/remediation implementation surfaces operators must resume
findings.recommendation: Backfill parent and 009 discovery artifacts so key_files and/or resource maps include the deep-loop runtime fan-out files, deep-loop workflow files, deep/speckit command surfaces, and remediation child docs; regenerate graph metadata from finalized packet docs after the stale 009 parent is repaired.
findings.disposition_evidence: graph-metadata-parser.ts deriveKeyFiles() fixed (this remediation cycle) to read spec.md frontmatter _memory.continuity.key_files, not just doc-prose references; root and 008-loop-systems-remediation graph-metadata.json both regenerated and now list the real fan-out/remediation runtime surfaces.

findings.title: Lag-ceiling observability events normalize to unknown status
findings.recommendation: Map lag_ceiling_exceeded and lag_ceiling_abort to typed warning/failed-or-retrying statuses and add a normalized observability event regression assertion.
findings.disposition_evidence: fanout-run.cjs statusForLedgerEvent() maps lag_ceiling_exceeded to warning/failed and lag_ceiling_abort to failed, never falling through to the unknown default.

findings.title: Leaf-only GLM lineage is skipped by registry-only fan-out merge
findings.recommendation: Before synthesis/merge, run the reducer to reconstruct the lineage registry from JSONL or teach fanout-merge.cjs to consume leaf-only review state when registry files are intentionally absent; then assert the merged output carries all active GLM findings.
findings.lineage_local_mitigation: Synthesis reconciled this lineage by writing a registry from JSONL findingDetails; the underlying merge-path issue remains for other leaf-only lineages.
findings.disposition_evidence: fanout-merge.cjs exports and wires reconstructReviewRegistryFromState(), shipped by 009-research-backlog-remediation/001-fanout-merge-schema-tolerance.

note: Iteration 011 completed with a JSONL delta and iteration-011.md (CONDITIONAL). All 11 iterations are verified.
